question_text:
Integer to English Words

Convert non-negative integer to its English words representation.
explanation: Divide number by 1000 (Billion, Million, Thousand, unit). Use a recursive helper for three-digit chunks.

test_cases.expected_output: "One Million Two Hundred Thirty Four Thousand Five Hundred Sixty Seven"
"Two Billion One Hundred Forty Seven Million Four Hundred Eighty Three Thousand Six Hundred Forty Seven"
